# Vomtu - Cinematic Video Production via AI

## Overview
Vomtu is a premium "Cinematic Modernism" audiovisual production agency specializing in creating high-converting video ads (spots) for elite eCommerce brands using advanced Artificial Intelligence. We deliver professional, high-fidelity spots in 48 hours, eliminating the friction of traditional production.

## Services
We offer specialized video production optimized for vertical formats (TikTok Ads, Instagram Reels/Stories) and horizontal formats (YouTube).

### 1. Spot Único (One-Off Spot)
- **Price:** €300–800.
- **Description:** High-impact production for collection launches. Includes AI cinematic visuals, precision copywriting, and priority delivery.

### 2. Retainer Mensual (Monthly Retainer)
- **Price:** From €1200/month.
- **Description:** Scalable creative pipelines for performance marketing. Includes unlimited revisions and strategic account management.

## Target Audience
DTC (Direct to Consumer) eCommerce brands focusing on fast scaling. We currently have specialized experience in Fashion/Accessories, General Collections, and Supplements.

## Contact & Booking
Users can book a 15-minute strategic demo directly via our website seamlessly.
